introSection: Hochschaubahn (formerly known as Alpenbahn) is a wooden roller coaster at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. It is in area "Nr. 113".

sections.title: Design
sections.content: It has three drops, including a double dip, and eight tunnels.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 2 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows, except for the back car which has 3, for a total of 14 riders per train.

fullText:
Hochschaubahn (formerly known as Alpenbahn) is a wooden roller coaster at Prater in Vienna, Vienna, Austria. It is in area "Nr. 113".

It has three drops, including a double dip, and eight tunnels.

2 trains with 2 cars per train. In each car, riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows, except for the back car which has 3, for a total of 14 riders per train.
